violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Raw animal foods such as raw chicken and raw beef were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as fruits and vegetables in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Food was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The walk- in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The hand sink plumbing was observed in poor repair. The floor in the walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to re grout the areas of low grout on the kitchen floor. The floor in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to repair the floor in the walk in cooler. The floor and ceiling in the back hallway are in poor repair. the physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to repair the floor and ceiling. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2023
